heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Snow showers likely near and north of Route 2, scattered to the south; a squall possible. A trace to 2 inches of snow, mainly in the hills. Valley highs in the mid to upper 30s, with lower 30s far north, and around 40 far south. North to northwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Chance of an early snow shower north, otherwise clearing. Lows in the mid to upper teens, colder hollows in the lower teens. Northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then diminishing overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s north, and mid to upper 40s in the south, except around 50 in southeastern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph in the Champlain Valley.
